intended_use: The Felix™ NeuroAI™ Wristband is indicated to aid in tremor-related functional limitations in the upper limbs in adults with essential tremor.
intended_use_full: The Felix™ NeuroAI™ Wristband is indicated to aid in tremor-related functional limitations in the upper limbs in adults with essential tremor.
ground_truth: TETRAS (Tremor Research Group Essential Tremor Rating Assessment Scale) mADL score assessed by blinded raters; physician-rated TETRAS Performance Subscale items; patient-rated ADL items and global impression scales.
other_metrics: Primary endpoint: Change in TETRAS modified Activities of Daily Living (mADL) score from baseline pre-stimulation to Day 90 showed significantly greater improvements in Felix group compared to sham control. Secondary endpoints included TETRAS Performance Subscale scores, Clinical Global Impression of Improvement (CGI-I), Patient Global Impression of Improvement (PGI-I), and Quality of Life in Essential Tremor Questionnaire (QUEST). Study found significant changes in TETRAS Performance Subscale ratings from baseline to 90 days in both stimulated and non-stimulated limbs in Felix group.
